title: Password Reset Link Not Working
description: Customer reports that the password reset email link expires immediately after clicking.

title: Subscription Renewal Failed
description: Customer attempted to renew their subscription but payment was declined despite multiple attempts.

title: Error Loading Dashboard
description: Customer’s dashboard shows a blank screen when logging in via Safari browser.

title: Incorrect Order Quantity
description: Customer ordered 3 items but only 2 were shipped.

title: Mobile Notifications Not Received
description: Customer is not receiving push notifications on iOS 17 devices.

title: Refund Process Delayed
description: Customer requested a refund 3 weeks ago but hasn’t received confirmation.

title: Invoice Shows Wrong Currency
description: Customer’s invoice is displayed in USD instead of EUR despite account settings.

title: App Freezes During Checkout
description: Customer reports the app freezes when attempting to complete checkout.

title: Email Verification Not Received
description: Customer signed up but never received the verification email.

title: Profile Picture Upload Fails
description: Customer cannot upload a profile picture; error message appears every time.

title: Delayed Shipping Notification
description: Customer did not receive any update about delayed shipping for their order.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Not Working
description: Customer reports that the 2FA code is not being accepted during login.
